query:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, w.balance, w.updatedAt 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN wallets w ON u.id = w.userId 
WHERE u.role = 'client' 
ORDER BY u.id DESC 
LIMIT 5;
